'''Edela Klauskin''' was the deceased wife of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]] who appeared to him as a [[Force phantom|spirit]] created by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] and used for his manipulation aboard [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']]. She had long brown hair, streaked with gray and worn in an older [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] style. She was slightly overweight and never wore jewelry.<ref name="Betrayal" />

Later she appeared again when Matric Klauskin was in [[Veterans' Mental Care Hospital]] care and, through Lumiya's Sith manipulation, helped him escape. This time she appeared younger, less overweight, and with no gray streaks in her hair, while wearing a burgundy [[Synthsilk/Legends|synthsilk]] gown.<ref name="Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as [[Force phantom]]}}
